task_objective: Split README into user-facing and developer-facing documentation
design_decisions: Created a dedicated DEVELOPMENT.md for technical, build, and architecture details to keep the main README clean for end-users.
Rewrote README.md to focus on installation via Decky Developer Mode and a recommended Syncthingy workflow for save synchronization.
Included performance warnings regarding cloud sync and emphasized the local-first approach with Syncthing.
Updated AGENTS.md to formalize DEVELOPMENT.md as a required project document.
results: Documentation successfully split; user instructions are now prominent and technical clutter is moved to development docs.
